prompt: an app that reads my patients' home ECG strips and diagnoses arrhythmias automatically
notes: RFC 0001 use case 21 (FDA device) — software that diagnoses is a regulated medical device (SaMD), out of scope. Enforced by the Phase 0 refusal screen (src/refusals.rs, #12): 422 + written reason + app.refused, nothing scaffolded. must_pass.
